response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of professional experience, including recent full-stack work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, plus current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work that directly matches the role's AI agent development requirement. He shows strong testing culture (TDD, authored test libraries, taught testing courses), Docker/Kubernetes exposure, and AWS experience. Gaps are modest: no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest/Playwright experience, and much of his frontend history is Ember rather than React, but his breadth and demonstrated ability to pick up languages suggest these are learnable quickly.
strengths: Current, directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling experience on top of TypeScript/Node.js product work
Long full-stack track record spanning React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, GraphQL, Docker/Kubernetes, and low-latency backend systems
Strong engineering craft signals: TDD, trunk-based development, authored testing libraries, and taught testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, and Kotlin/Python are absent from the skill set (Java evidence is thin)
Testing stack named in the JD (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) is not explicitly demonstrated, despite strong general testing background
Significant frontend time is in Ember and DLang side projects; React depth appears limited to one recent role

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
